case_title: NETJETS SERVICES, INC. VS. ANTHONY MARTARELLA

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NETJETS SERVICES, INC. SERVED DEC-12-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTARELLA, ANTHONY PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JAN-23-2006 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NETJETS SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTARELLA, ANTHONY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NETJETS SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTARELLA, ANTHONY $14,914.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,824.15 INTEREST, $303.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,041.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
